turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. Mujhe yeh confirm karna tha ki mera insurance se jo amount settle hua, usske baad balance kya bacha hai mujhe pay karna.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bilkul. Aapka naam aur patient ID please?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Mr. Gokhale, aapke records dekhta hoon. Total bill tha ₹38,500. HDFC Ergo ne ₹31,200 settle kar diya hai. Aapka outstanding balance ₹7,300 hai.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Theek hai. Main UPI se pay kar sakta hoon abhi?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan bilkul. Payment link bhej deta hoon aapke registered number pe. Complete karne ke baad receipt SMS pe aayega.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bahut acha! Aapka account fully cleared ho gaya hai. Koi aur sawaal?
